description.p: AzPainter is a lightweight full-color painting software designed for editing images and creating illustrations. It features a unique GUI built with Xlib and provides a fast, responsive user experience.

ul.li: High-speed performance with XInput2-based pressure sensitivity support.
Supports both 8-bit and 16-bit (15-bit fixed-point) color depths for high-precision editing.
Wide range of supported formats: APD (v1-v4), ADW (v1-v2), PSD, BMP, PNG, JPEG, GIF, TIFF, and WebP.
Memory-efficient layer system with four color types: RGBA, Grayscale, Alpha only, and 1-bit Alpha.
Advanced text layers supporting vertical text, ruby characters (furigana), tate-chu-yoko, and character specification by CID.
Support for "Composite Fonts" allowing users to replace specific characters with glyphs from other fonts.
Screen tone display functionality for Grayscale and 1-bit Alpha layers, ideal for comic creation.
